Inter-block tensors (boundary_input, final) are plain at the model-wrapper boundary by construction under plain_boundary mode; their high risk is STRUCTURAL, not a finding against the mitigation bundle. Under masked_boundary_experimental (Stage 5.6 extension) the inter-block residual is masked by a fresh orthogonal N_inter so boundary_input / final join the masked tensor set and the overall recommendation is bounded by the masked-only grade.
